name: wire-empty-package-reject
description: A package entry with an empty export map (`{}`). A `clientCapabilities.gadgets` package entry MUST declare at least one export — an entry that names a package but uses none of its exports carries no wire meaning. `gadgetPackageUseSchema` refines on `Object.keys(r).length > 0`, so an empty entry MUST be rejected.
rejectReason: a clientCapabilities.gadgets package entry must declare at least one export (gadgetPackageUseSchema non-empty refine).
